behavior_summary: Provides a short examine/lookup description for a candle object and small visual-state controls for its animation/frame index.
U8P_CANDLE::look displays the one-line description 'candle ' when the player examines the item.
U8P_CANDLE::anim invokes an animation-frame reversal helper (METHOD::reverseAnimFrame) to alter the candle's displayed animation, likely producing a flicker or stepping animation direction.

U8P_CANDLE::use reads the item's frame (via Item::getFrame), checks low-order bits, and either increments the frame index by one or clears the low bits (via Item::setFrame), implying a toggle/advance of the candle's visible state (lit/unlit or animation phase).
notable_control_flow: U8P_CANDLE::look: simple linear flow — emit a single Bark 'candle ' then suspend/return.
U8P_CANDLE::anim: calls external METHOD::reverseAnimFrame and then suspends; no branching seen.
U8P_CANDLE::use: read-modify-write pattern — local1 = Item::getFrame(this); if (local1 & 0x03 == 0) then Item::setFrame(local1 + 1, this) else Item::setFrame(local1 & 0x00FC, this).
open_questions: What exact player action triggers U8P_CANDLE::use (player 'U8P_CANDLE::use' verb, an engine event, or scripted trigger)? — confidence: medium (inferred from process classification).
What do the low 2 bits of the frame represent (animation phase, burn state, or flag bits)? — confidence: low.
When and how often is U8P_CANDLE::anim invoked by the game (periodic timer, state change, or external event)? — confidence: low.

Triggered when the engine runs the 'U8P_CANDLE::look' process type for the item (processType 0x0208).

external_calls.purpose: Reverse or step the object's animation frame/direction to change displayed animation (inferred flicker control).
Read the current frame/index of the item instance (used as basis for branching and updates).
Write a computed frame/index back to the item to update its displayed graphic (either incremented or masked value).
